## Testing Checklist

- [ ] I ran `pnpm run test:impact` and followed the recommended checks.
- [ ] Broad changes pass `pnpm run test:ci` coverage thresholds.
- [ ] API wrapper changes update `tests/api`.
- [ ] Utility, store, composable, or Axios changes update `tests/unit`.
- [ ] Reusable component changes update `tests/component`.
- [ ] Route, menu, permission, or page workflow changes update Playwright E2E.
- [ ] E2E data is created dynamically and cleaned up; no fixed business IDs.
